description: CompositionRound neck white top in 100% cotton, with rubber print on chest and soft elastic raffle towards the waistFittingRegularWash care1. Machine wash separately in cold water2. Warm iron only, do not iron directly on print/embroiderygirls love to look pretty, and there's no better way to please your little girl than with this cotton top from disney. The soft elastic raffle at the waist ensures a snug Fit besides adding a feminine touch to the dress, while the rubber print on the chest adds a sense a style statement. Add to this top a pair of pretty footwear from the crocs collection available at myntra, include colourful jibbitz, and transform your little darling into a princess.
